docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY RANNEY, TIFFANY AS TO DEFENDANT LOFTON, WARRENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RANNEY, TIFFANY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RANNEY, TIFFANY AS TO DEFENDANT LOFTON, WARRENE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RANNEY, TIFFANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOFTON, WARRENE $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,200.00 ARE INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL COLE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED AUG-13-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOFTON, WARRENE
